feedback.text: I would also like to point out here that Datings Services such as Tinder, but also coupleships, do not offer the service they promise. Tinder (Premium): during the APP, I was tried several times by English-speaking ladies to increase either in Crypto Curenzys or a trading workshop. And Tinder has a very difficult process to report these profiles, which in some cases is no longer possible after being blocked. Pairing: for a year of premium of over 400 I have made troz efforts, no success. I believe that the service behind ‘This is not in our hands’ is hidden. Although it is strongly advertised, someone can use the service. The deregistration process is also very cumbersome with formal notice. But it is very easy to register, the typic cage, easy to enter, exit as hard as possible. Similar to Amazon. Last but not least, I would like to mention the ‘Stop Killing Games’ initiative here. I am not part of the scope of the digital fairness act, but you may be able to take part in it. In principle, I am concerned with whom a product was purchased and I can still use it later. And it is not completely destroyed by publishers or developers, or even my access to the product is completely removed for any ridiculous reasons.
